name: GPT-5-Codex
archDisplay: GPT-5 fine-tuned for agentic software engineering with dynamic thinking-time scaling; dense transformer, exact size undisclosed
note: GPT-5 optimized for agentic coding; can run autonomously for hours inside Codex.
verificationNotes: Release date Sept 15, 2025 confirmed via multiple independent sources (TechCrunch 'openai-upgrades-codex-with-a-new-version-of-gpt-5' dated 2025-09-15, Simon Willison's blog dated same day, and search results confirming the OpenAI blog post itself was published 2025-09-15; general API availability to Codex-via-API-key followed on Sept 23). Pricing ($1.25/$10 per 1M) and 400K context confirmed by live-fetching developers.openai.com/api/docs/models/gpt-5-codex. SWE-bench Verified 74.5% confirmed present on the cited webpronews.com article and independently reproduced by Yahoo Tech coverage of the same launch. No changes made.
